race.comment: ROYAL SWAY (2) has gone from strength-to-strength each run this time in and finds another good race to keep the ball rolling. Drawn sticky but gets an important 3kg claim. Big chance to bring up the hat-trick. UNDISPUTABLE (5) was a dominant winner at Moe three back then has run into a smart one in his last two in town back in Vic. Strips rock-hard fit and only needs to hold his form to be fighting out the finish. OAK PARK  MADDISON (1) has held her own against tougher company through this prep and doesn't know how to run a bad race. Gets in well with the 3kg claimer engaged and deserves respect. DAVIDA (3) dropped out quickly first-up at Sandown-Hillside when clearly going amiss. Can improve sharply with that run out of the way and should look to spear across from the wide alley to lead. Can give a sight. MISS SGHIRRIPA (10) is doing enough to play a role as well.
